title: Summa Theologiae I.2: The Five Ways
description: Thomas Aquinas' five proofs for God's existence: motion, causation, contingency, degrees of perfection, and design.
introduction: Thomas Aquinas' five proofs for God's existence: motion, causation, contingency, degrees of perfection, and design.

translation.text: The first and most manifest way is the argument from motion. Whatever is in motion must be put in motion by another.
